title: Multi-thread contact depth doubled across the book this quarter
anchor: Average contacts per account sits at 4.6 this quarter, up from 2.3 last quarter.
connect: 38 of 47 accounts now carry 4-plus engaged contacts, compared to 18 of 47 last quarter.
body: Average contacts per account sits at 4.6 this quarter, up from 2.3 last quarter. 38 of 47 accounts now carry 4-plus engaged contacts, compared to 18 of 47 last quarter.
trace: Multi-threading signal shows significant improvement in relationship depth across the portfolio.

title: Champion re-engagement events converted back to green health scores
anchor: 9 accounts where champions had gone quiet received confirmed responses in April.
connect: 7 of those 9 accounts crossed back to green health within 21 days of re-engagement.
body: 9 accounts where champions had gone quiet received confirmed responses in April. 7 of those 9 accounts crossed back to green health within 21 days of re-engagement.
trace: Champion outreach activity in April showing strong conversion back to healthy status.

title: Two-week outreach coverage reaches highest level since Q4 2025

title: Early-renewal pull-forward delivered $420K in Q2 commitments
anchor: 6 accounts originally tracking to Q3 or Q4 closed early renewals in Q2.

body: 6 accounts originally tracking to Q3 or Q4 closed early renewals in Q2. 5 of those 6 accounts had been flagged green for two consecutive months before the early-commit conversation.
trace: Early renewal activity correlates strongly with sustained green health status.
